heroDesc: JRS POS helps restaurants manage orders, menus, tables, and customers — all from one powerful app.
featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools designed specifically for the F&B industry
feature1Desc: Easily create and update your restaurant menu in real time.
feature2Desc: Get detailed insights and analytics about your restaurant's performance.
feature3Desc: Track and manage your loyal customers with built-in CRM tools.
feature4Desc: Available on Android and iOS. Manage your restaurant from anywhere.
ctaDesc: Our support team is ready to assist you with any questions about JRS POS.
contactSubtitle: Have a question or need support? Reach out to the JRS POS support team — we are happy to help.
contactFormSubtitle: Fill in the form below and the JRS team will respond within 1–2 business days.
contactSuccessDesc: Thank you for contacting JRS. Our team will get back to you soon.
deleteSubtitle: This page allows you to request permanent deletion of your JRS POS account managed by JRS.
deleteWarningTitle: Warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
deleteWarningDesc: Once your account is deleted, all associated data will be permanently removed from our systems.
deleteItem1: JRS POS account and login credentials
deleteItem2: Personal profile (name, phone number, email address)
deleteItem5: All other data linked to your account
retainItem1: Anonymized transaction data for legal/tax compliance (up to 5 years, per applicable law)
deleteHow1Desc: Open JRS POS app → Settings → Account → Delete Account, then follow the on-screen steps.
deleteHow2Title: Submit a request via this form
deleteHow2Desc: Fill in the form below. Our team will process your deletion request within 7 business days.
deleteFormSubtitle: Please provide your JRS POS account details. This request is sent directly to the JRS support team.
deleteConfirmCheck: I understand that deleting my JRS POS account is permanent and irreversible. All my personal data managed by JRS will be permanently deleted.
deleteConfirmDesc1: Your JRS POS account deletion request has been submitted to JRS.
deleteConfirmDesc2: Our team will process your request within 7 business days and send a confirmation to your registered email.
deleteConfirmDesc3: If you do not receive a confirmation within 7 days, please contact us:
footerTagline: Smart restaurant management platform — manage your menu, orders, customers, and analytics, all in one place.
privacyIntroDesc: This Privacy Policy explains how JRS (the developer of the JRS POS application) collects, uses, discloses, and safeguards your information. JRS is committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you have a positive experience on our website and with our applications.
privacyCollectionItem1: Account information (name, email, phone number, business details)
privacyCollectionItem5: Device information (IP address, device type, operating system)
privacyCollectionItem6: Usage data (features used, time spent, interactions)
privacyUseItem1: Provide and improve the JRS POS service
privacyUseItem2: Process transactions and send related information
privacyUseItem3: Send promotional communications and updates (with your consent)
privacyUseItem4: Respond to your inquiries and customer support requests
privacyUseItem5: Conduct research and analytics to improve our services
privacyProtectionDesc: JRS implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. We use encryption, secure servers, and access controls to safeguard your data.
privacyRetentionDesc: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide services and fulfill legal obligations. Transaction records and anonymized data may be retained for up to 5 years in accordance with applicable law.
privacyThirdPartyDesc: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information with service providers who assist us in operating our website and conducting our business, subject to confidentiality obligations.
privacyCookiesDesc: Our website uses cookies to enhance user experience and collect usage data. You can control cookie settings through your browser. However, disabling cookies may affect website functionality.
privacyRightsItem3: Request deletion of your account and associated data
privacyRightsItem5: Data portability (in a structured, portable format)
privacyContactDesc: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact the JRS support team:
